title: Spear of Longinus
wikitext:
[]: Spear of Longinus?             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Tue Sep 28, 2010 3:46 am Okay so I was perusing the forums and something caught my eye in the (I don't actually know what it is called, and yes you can laugh at me for it) the top decal thing. The thing that caught my eye is the fact that it says Spear of Longinus. I will assume that most everyone has noticed this as well, and I am almost certain this has brought up before. Don't get me wrong I'm a huge Eva fan and I try to follow most Eva forums, but I have never heard of it referred to this way and was wondering if it actually is ever called this. If not I propose a fixing =P

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Sep 28, 2010 3:58 am [wkimg:2974wmha]M25 C655 big.jpg[/wkimg:2974wmha] You can refer it to either Lance or Spear. It's the same word in Japanese and the regionalization decided to go with "Lance", whereas some people prefer "Spear".

[]:             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Wed Sep 29, 2010 1:37 am yea i figured it wouldnt be to different as a spear and lance are essentially the same thing just wanted to know when it was referred to as spear, never caught that image thanks lol
